The '''Syndaar Military Prep School''' was a training academy for future [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. Its student body included the children of Imperial soldiers assigned to [[Thrasybule sector/Legends|Thrasybule sector]].

It was [[Bombing of Syndaar Military Prep School|attacked]] by a [[spore bomb]] created by the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] terrorist [[Ort Hoogra-D'En]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Gone To Ground|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}}
